message:
fix(vdbe,core): implement SQL three-valued NULL logic for comparisons

Comparisons involving NULL were incorrectly returning 0 (false) instead
of NULL, violating SQL's three-valued logic. Add IsNull guards before
all comparison opcodes (Gt, Lt, Ge, Le, Eq, Ne) in three code paths:
emit_having_expr, emit_expr_with_fallback/emit_comparison (VDBE), and
emit_binary_expr (connection). When either operand is NULL, the result
register now receives Null instead of Integer(0).

Also deduplicates the HAVING expression codegen by collapsing six
identical comparison arms into a single match with an inner opcode
lookup.

Adds regression tests in fsqlite/src/lib.rs verifying NULL comparisons
return NULL while IS/IS NOT still return 0/1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
